bootup_message.description: Message shown when system boots up, {version} will be replaced with actual version
bootup_message.text:
All good vibes loaded
{version}
WLAN: goodvibes
Pass.: goodvibes123
IP: 192.168.4.1
Hostname: kaffee

welcome_title.description: Main welcome message displayed at startup

welcome_decoration.description: Decorative text shown after welcome title

separator.description: Separator line used between quote sections

finish_prefix.description: Prefix before the random adjective. {word} will be replaced with a random adjective

adjectives.description: List of random adjectives used in the finish message

error_csv_load.description: Error message when CSV file fails to load

error_no_data.description: Error message when no data is available to select

error_encoding.description: Error message when text encoding fails

image_conversion_progress.description: Printed on the receipt while converting an uploaded image to .bin. {current} and {total} are replaced with progress numbers.

print_welcome_enabled.description: Whether a short button press prints the welcome lines (title + decoration) at the start. Uncheck to skip.

print_quotes_enabled.description: Whether a short button press prints a random quote. Uncheck to skip quotes.

print_images_enabled.description: Whether a short button press prints a random header image. Uncheck to skip images.

print_finish_enabled.description: Whether a short button press prints the sign-off finish line at the end. Uncheck to skip.

runtime_poll_interval_seconds.description: How often (in seconds) the background thread checks for new/updated quotes and images. 0 or less disables periodic checking.

runtime_print_on_update.description: Whether newly detected quotes/images should be printed once automatically. Set to "false" to only convert/reload silently.

runtime_new_quote_announcement.description: Printed before a newly detected quote is auto-printed.

runtime_new_image_announcement.description: Printed before a newly detected header image is auto-printed.
